description: Akamai API Protection configuration for AhmedETAP Platform REST API. Discovers API schema, validates requests against OpenAPI spec, and detects API abuse.

protection_rules.name: Validate OpenAPI conformance
protection_rules.description: Reject requests that don't match the OpenAPI 3.0 spec (wrong paths, methods, parameters, or body schemas). Catches API probing and fuzzing.

protection_rules.name: JWT validation at edge
protection_rules.description: Validate JWT signature and expiration at the edge before forwarding to origin. Reduces origin load from invalid token attempts.

protection_rules.name: Block API key in URL query
protection_rules.description: Block requests that pass API keys or tokens as query parameters (e.g., ?api_key=...). Tokens must be in headers to avoid logging in URLs/proxy logs.

protection_rules.name: Enforce HTTPS only
protection_rules.description: Block all HTTP requests. Akamai terminates TLS; the origin connection is also TLS.

protection_rules.name: Per-user API rate limiting
protection_rules.description: Limit each authenticated user to 600 API requests per minute. Uses the JWT sub claim as the rate-limit key.

protection_rules.name: Block concurrent sessions per user
protection_rules.description: Limit each user to 5 concurrent API requests. Prevents script abuse while allowing normal browser behavior.

protection_rules.name: Schema validation on auth endpoints
protection_rules.description: Strict schema validation for /register and /login. Reject malformed payloads early.
